dit SideBar Main / FinalConfiguration Setup the host name of host computer to be "z-host" (It is the default host in network_test.sh. if this host name set to be others, network_test.sh on zumy also need to be modified) In auto_connect.py in odroid_m

eed to be modified) In auto_connect.py in odroid_machine package, assign zumy to self.family_name In ros_env_loader.bash in odroid_machine package, assign zumy to MACHINE_TYPE In odroid_machine.launch (of package odroid_machine), change odroid_machin

(of package odroid_machine), change odroid_machine_path to /home/zumy/coop_slam_workspace/src/odroid_machine In odroid_machine.launch (of package odroid_machine), change user argument in machine tag from odroid to zumy ROS hostname setup SSH key set
